case_title: SANABRIA, LICHA vs. MCCURN, FELICIA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF SANABRIA, LICHA $875.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $875.00, COSTS PER COST BILL. CASE IS CONSOLIDATED WITH SMALL CLAIMS #746940 MCCURN VS. SANABRIA.

HYDE RE TRANSFER TO PENDING MUNICIPAL COURT ACTION. 2- COMPLAINT-UNLAWFUL DETAINER 3- SMALL CLAIMS CASE #746940 4- PROOF OF SERVICE 5- ORDER TO TRANSFER SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER KAPLAN
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANABRIA, LICHA COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-07-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE JEROME T. BENSON, DPADILLA, REPORTER, BWILBER, CLERK 9:00 AM C/C FOR TRIAL. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION. TERMS STATED ON RECORD. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 629 3RD AVENUE, MIDDLE UNIT. RENT AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED. RENT AND DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2745.00 AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $130.00. EXECUTION IS STAYED UNTIL DEC. 2, 1994, 6:00PM WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: DEFT SHALL PAY PLTF $2,000.00 CASHIER CHECK BY NOV 8, 1994 AT CLOSE OF BUSINESS. DEFT SHALL DELIVER KEYS FOR LAUNDRY ROOM AND LOWER SPACE. DEFT SHALL RECOGNIZE THAT THE PROPERTY IS FOR SALE. DEFT WILL ALLOW ENTRY OF STEVE BELL ON PREMISES. DEFT WILL CLEAN THE PREMISES IN GOOD CONDITION. IF DEFT FAILED AS STIPULATED, PLTF MAY SEEK JUDGMENT AND LIFT STAY AND SUBMIT EX-PARTE FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
#1 BENSON: SMALL CLAIMS CASE #746940 IS ORDERED CONSOLIDATED WITH MUNI CT #110267.
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-03-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

#3 JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY/CSR, ALEONG/CLERK - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; CONSOLIDATED WITH SMALL CLAIMS #746940; SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY DENNIS HYDE; ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE SUBMITTED BY BOTH SIDES; CASE SUBMITTED.
